name: @ui-organized/code-connect
description: Figma Code Connect for UI Organized — maps Figma components to real @ui-organized/react components (props, source paths, usage), stores the mapping as a git-native manifest, and serves it to AI coding agents over MCP so generated code references real components instead of hallucinating new ones. Connect.md Phases 1–3 (schema, scanner, stdio MCP server).
